summary: The lesson explains how to create a content planner by analyzing top-ranking pages for relevant keywords and structure. This helps in generating high-quality content using AI tools like ChatGPT.
key_points: Copy H2, H3, H4 tags from competitors
Use word count for target length
Collect related searches and image subtopics
